title: myriopteris hirta
intro: Myriopteris hirta, also known as the hairy maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Myriopteris hirta include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Myriopteris hirta may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
